title: 量子计算
subtitle: Quantum Computing, Next-Generation Computing, Quantum Technology
assistant_message: Learn to discuss quantum computing, its principles, and its potential impact on various fields.

examples.chinese: 相比于传统计算机，量子计算机的计算速度更快。
examples.translation: Compared to traditional computers, quantum computers have faster computing speeds.
examples.translation_id: Dibandingkan dengan komputer tradisional, komputer kuantum memiliki kecepatan komputasi yang lebih cepat.

examples.chinese: 量子计算不仅将改变计算方式，而且将影响密码学、材料科学等领域。
examples.translation: Quantum computing will not only change computing methods but also affect fields like cryptography and materials science.
examples.translation_id: Komputasi kuantum tidak hanya akan mengubah metode komputasi tetapi juga akan mempengaruhi bidang-bidang seperti kriptografi dan ilmu material.

grammar.point: Using 尽管如此 (jǐn guǎn rú cǐ)

examples.chinese: 量子计算潜力巨大，尽管如此，技术成熟还需要时间。
examples.translation: Quantum computing has great potential; nevertheless, it will take time for the technology to mature.
examples.translation_id: Komputasi kuantum memiliki potensi besar; meskipun demikian, diperlukan waktu untuk teknologi ini matang.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Kong Wei
dialogue.chinese: 相比于传统计算机，量子计算机的计算速度更快。你觉得它会取代传统计算机吗？
dialogue.pinyin: Xiāngbǐ yú chuántǒng jìsuànjī, liàngzǐ jìsuànjī de jìsuàn sùdù gèng kuài. Nǐ juéde tā huì qǔdài chuántǒng jìsuànjī ma?
dialogue.translation: Compared to traditional computers, quantum computers have faster computing speeds. Do you think they will replace traditional computers?
dialogue.translation_id: Dibandingkan dengan komputer tradisional, komputer kuantum memiliki kecepatan komputasi yang lebih cepat. Apakah Anda pikir mereka akan menggantikan komputer tradisional?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Jiang Yan
dialogue.chinese: 量子计算不仅将改变计算方式，而且将影响密码学、材料科学等领域。但它更适合特定任务。
dialogue.pinyin: Liàngzǐ jìsuàn bùjǐn jiāng gǎibiàn jìsuàn fāngshì, érqiě jiāng yǐngxiǎng mìmǎ xué, cáiliào kēxué děng lǐngyù. Dàn tā gèng shìhé tèdìng rènwu.
dialogue.translation: Quantum computing will not only change computing methods but also affect fields like cryptography and materials science. But it is more suitable for specific tasks.
dialogue.translation_id: Komputasi kuantum tidak hanya akan mengubah metode komputasi tetapi juga akan mempengaruhi bidang-bidang seperti kriptografi dan ilmu material. Namun lebih cocok untuk tugas-tugas tertentu.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Kong Wei
dialogue.chinese: 量子计算目前面临哪些挑战？
dialogue.pinyin: Liàngzǐ jìsuàn mùqián miànlín nǎxiē tiǎozhàn?
dialogue.translation: What challenges does quantum computing currently face?
dialogue.translation_id: Tantangan apa yang saat ini dihadapi oleh komputasi kuantum?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Jiang Yan
dialogue.chinese: 量子计算潜力巨大，尽管如此，技术成熟还需要时间。稳定性和纠错是主要难题。
dialogue.pinyin: Liàngzǐ jìsuàn qiánlì jùdà, jǐnguǎn rúcǐ, jìshù chéngshú hái xūyào shíjiān. Wěndìng xìng hé jiūcuò shì zhǔyào nántí.
dialogue.translation: Quantum computing has great potential; nevertheless, it will take time for the technology to mature. Stability and error correction are major challenges.
dialogue.translation_id: Komputasi kuantum memiliki potensi besar; meskipun demikian, diperlukan waktu untuk teknologi ini matang. Stabilitas dan koreksi kesalahan adalah tantangan utama.

exercises.question: What does 量子计算 (liàngzǐ jìsuàn) mean?
What does 相比于 (xiāngbǐ yú) express?
Complete: 量子计算潜力巨大，______，技术成熟还需要时间。
